organization: Google Developer Groups on Campus Haliç
title: Organiser
comment:
- Creating a network of alumnis and students inside Haliç University
- Holding summits for developers and students both from and outside of our campus
- Holding meetings and creating a network between other communities and companies for our campus
- Helping to raise new organisers inline with the culture of our campus
- Working together with our Department of Communities to improve community processes
